​

Lunch Week 28, 2026

Lunch 149-159kr

‍

Enjoy your lunch at Troppo!

Lunch is served Monday through Friday from 11am - 2pm. Price includes food, ice-water and coffee brewed freshly with love.

Vegan? Gluten-free? Lactose? Please alert your waiter when ordering when you arrive and you will get information on what options you may choose from.

Lunch is available both as dine-in or take-out!

‍

Monday-Friday

Enjoy your lunch at Troppo - week 28, 2026

‍
‍
Five Spice Chicken

Oven-baked boneless chicken thight fillet, shiitake mushrooms, pak choi, pickled ginger, five spice sauce.

Served with steamed jasmine rice. (Chinese-
S-E Asia)‍‍


or


Shrimp Noodles

Stir-fried egg noodles, shrimp, Chinese broccoli, garlic chives, cabbage, pak choi, lime, bean sprouts, peanuts.

(Chinese-S-E Asia)‍
‍

or

‍
Mock Duck

Vegan "duck", bell peppers, scallions, onion, water chestnuts, shiitake, chili, cashewnuts.

Served with steamed jasmine rice. (Chinese-
S-E Asia)

Find us

Brunnshögsgatan 34, 224 82 Lund

(On the corner across from LKF office, and next to Mama Mia BVC)

open Hours

Lunch served Mon-Fri 11am-2pm
Dinner served Tue-Sat 5pm-late

PARKING

Several parking garages are located in the area, for example in the same building as Hemköp or a second garage called Niels Bohr, just next to the Colive building, around the corner from Troppo.
